transcript.text:
Hello everyone
I prepared some stuff to make hot dogs today
I will be eating Fire Chicken Noodles and hot dogs
It's my first time making hot dogs
[Sigh]
Let's go ahead and get started
It's easier if you use the Hotteok (Korean Sweet Pancake) mix flour
Pour 2 packs..
I memorized the recipe
Hot~
It's not hot water It's at 40 degrees celsius
This is hot water(?)
[Not hot water, but it's hot water]
Kind of over the surface
And then, cold water
[Cold water]

Is that correct..? It should be
Yeast! I forgot to put yeast
[Adds rest of the ingredients in]
[Dry]
I feel like it needs more water
[Adds water]
I put too much!
[Viewer: Hot dog batter needs to be thin and watery]
Where did you hear that? Is that true..?
[Viewer: Add more water!] You guys are trying to trick me again!
This is the bread dough
It's nicely done
[Complete]
Very nice~
Now we ferment the dough
How do we do that?

Whatever
Let's get this cheddar cheese This is going to taste so good
I love cheddar cheese
Roll it up like this
It fits perfectly!
[Viewer: I'm going to order some Myeongrang hot dogs (brand)]
Please don't tease me
That almost made me mad...
This looks delicious, right?
1... 2...
4...(?)
[Broken]
Why do I keep counting '4'?
[15]
[Viewer: Speedy fermentation] It doesn't need fermentation! (ignores recipe)
It's already fermented!

The dough is soft
Squishy
How thin does it need to be?
[Viewer: idk] You guys don't know? okay
Let's roll them up
The cheese is popping out
Close its mouth
[Viewers: That just looks like a sausage bread] [Fake hot dog!]
If I say it's a hot dog, then it's a hot dog
Very pretty
The cheese is coming out!
Oh no Let's cover it up
I should put some oil on my hands
Now these aren't rolling up
That's weird
[Viewer: If it doesn't stick to your hands, then it won't stick to the sausage]

You're right..
I was wrong
Everyone was saying I was finally doing something right when I was putting the cooking oil on my hands
Now that it doesn't work, people are saying that I shouldn't have done that
Really, guys?
[Viewer: How much for 1?]
I'm selling them for 5,000 Won each (~$4.41 USD)
[Viewer: Who will even buy that!?]
Who's going to buy it? I'm going to eat them!
2 flies!
The flies like the Hotteok dough?
Or the sausage?
The flies!?
How dare you
[Dough punch]
[Complete]

Fly!
[Deep-fry and it's done!] It's going to taste good
Let's see if the oil is hot and ready
1... 2...
The dough is coming off
My cuties that I tried really hard making
3...
I have to put the big ones in first That was dumb
Why didn't anybody tell me?
It's looking great
The color is like a ginseng
It won't let me flip Only 1 side is getting cooked
The temperature is too high It needs to get lowered
It's going to get ruined!
What do I do!?
Look at the color

[Viewer: Just take everything out for now]
Okay, let's take everything out
It's all ruined It's too hot
Let's cook them 1 by 1 Not all at once
Why won't it flip nicely? It just burns the dough
This needs to be cooked for about 6 minutes So the inside isn't cooked at all
[Viewer: That turban bread looks good] Chocolate turban bread?
The dough is not cooked all the way
[Crispy on the outside, raw on the inside]
Let's try it anyway
[It's all ruined]
Is that enough?
[Failure is the mother of success]
[Oh my Mother!]
HOT! HOT! HOT!
This is so hot! I need to add more

A lot more
So hot!
[Now it looks like corn dogs]
Is this how you do it?
It's ruined
Let's just microwave them
I'll just microwave the rest
Time to fix the camera
Shoong shoong shoong~ Lower the camera
Shoong shoong shoong~ Lower the camera
Shooooooong
Okay!
Hurry hurry hurry hurry
The noodles need to be cooked the same amount of time
2-minute timer, guys
[Viewers: Are we a timer now!? What are we?] I'm sorry

[Take out when it's ready]
[Pour out the water and prep for sauce]
This doesn't look like that much food because of the cauldron lid plating
2... 4...
6...
There was some water left on the bottom So it mixes well
Is it too watery?
My hotdogs...
[Sad]
I don't know why it turned out like this
[Microwaved]
Bon appetit!
These are hot dogs.. I made them
I was hoping it would turn out like a hot dog that's out in the market
It kind of looks like it(?)
I'll go ahead and try it There's cheddar cheese inside

It tastes good
The cheddar cheese makes it so much better
Success!
Fire chicken noodles!
It's spicy
I'm awake now!
So spicy
It feels spicier because the noodles are cold
I'll eat slowly
This is the burned hot dog
Let's eat it with the noodles
I need to mix it up some more
I'm tearing up
I want to wash the noodles with water
You can do it!
I barely have any water in here

I'm cold
Let's stick 1 with the chopstick
[Viewer: Where is the hot dog from?]
Where is it from? Tzuyang Products
[Viewer: You need to make a 'Tzuyang's Recipe']
No way I need to make a 'Tzuyang's Delicious Restaurant Map'
I don't even know how to cook
It's really cold
Is there a jacket? Give me a second, guys
It's really cold
Now that's better
It's the autumn wind
I'm scared to eat the fire chicken noodles
It's so spicy
I'm scared to eat it
Let's eat it all so it won't scare me

The Fire Demon (brand) is like 3-4 times spicier than this
But for me, this is spicier
If it has soup, it's not that spicy for me
Let's eat a hot dog
This isn't 2 bites for me
This is more than 1 pack of noodles
I saved 1 packet for this
This sausage tastes really good
Let's finish this hot dog and quickly eat all the noodles
Well, first off..
What was I just going to say?
It's so spicy that it took away my intelligence
Let's eat it once and for all!
Let's quickly finish it all
All in 1 bite
There's still so much left

Thanks everyone~
So spicy! [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
